from flask import Flask, request, abort
from pathlib import Path

app = Flask(__name__)

ALLOWED_ROLES = {"user", "admin", "moderator"}
BASE_DIR = Path("/data")


@app.route("/users", methods=["POST"])
def create_user():
    data = request.get_json()
    if not data or not data.get("name") or not data.get("email"):
        abort(400, "name and email are required")
    if len(data["name"]) > 255:
        abort(400, "name too long")
    if "@" not in data["email"]:
        abort(400, "invalid email")
    role = data.get("role", "user")
    if role not in ALLOWED_ROLES:
        abort(400, f"invalid role: {role}")
    user = db.create_user(name=data["name"], email=data["email"], role=role)
    return {"id": user.id}


@app.route("/search")
def search():
    query = request.args.get("q", "").strip()
    if not query or len(query) > 500:
        abort(400, "invalid query")
    results = search_engine.search(query)
    return {"results": results}


@app.route("/files/<path:filepath>")
def serve_file(filepath):
    resolved = (BASE_DIR / filepath).resolve()
    if not resolved.is_relative_to(BASE_DIR):
        abort(403, "access denied")
    with open(resolved) as f:
        return f.read()
